summary: The diff shows that backend/main.mo was modified to include the principal tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe in an adminPrincipalList using List.fromArray. REQ-8 appears to be substantially implemented: the principal is hardcoded in the backend file. However, the list contains only the new principal with no evidence of the canister deployer or other existing initial admins being preserved alongside it.

missing_requirements.requirement: The new principal must be added alongside any existing initial admins (e.g., the canister deployer), not as the sole initial admin.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows adminPrincipalList contains only the new principal. There is no evidence in the truncated diff that the canister deployer or other existing initial admins are preserved in the initial admin list. The constraint explicitly says do not remove or replace any existing initial admins.
